day: 09
description: Officers are not permitted to pay soldiers confined by the Civil Authority so the date of their imprisonment and release should be maintained on the muster roll. Application has made to the
  War Office respecting the clothing for Capt. Bruff's recruits.

- Author's Letterbook Copy
